headline: AbbVie vs. Pfizer: Which Pharma Giant Stock Is a Better Buy in 2026?
summary: AbbVie and Pfizer are taking divergent paths to navigate patent expirations and competition. Dig into their financials, risk profiles, and valuation metrics.
